title: anthurium espinae
intro: Anthurium espinae, also known as the Lord Howe Island anthurium or cut-leaf anthurium, is a species of flowering plant native to Lord Howe Island, Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Anthurium espinae include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Anthurium espinae typically involve using the plant's leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
